must_have_quals: 2 or more years of relevant experience required, Experience with Python, SAS, and SQL required, Experience working with healthcare data required, Knowledge of data modeling, statistical analysis, and machine learning techniques, Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, Effective written and verbal communication skills

job_summary: Vizient, Inc is committed to creating an inclusive environment for its employees. In this role, you will develop and deliver analytic solutions that support client decision-making and drive improvements in clinical, operational, and economic outcomes.
